source_jobs.title: Forward Deployed Recruiter - SWE
source_jobs.description:
About Sxaler

Sxaler operates on behalf of category-defining technology companies, combining exceptional recruiters with proprietary technology to identify, assess and hire top-percentile talent.

 

Our Forward Deployed Recruiters are embedded with our clients when hiring is p0, operating as one of them. Our stack makes us fast and precise, and our people bring a palate for hiring judgement and orchestration that cannot be fast-tracked. Our charter is maximum impact on hiring against in mission-critical environments.

 

The Mission

You will be deployed inside the highest-stakes hiring environments on Earth; we call them missions. AI labs, frontier models, robotics companies - anyone building the infrastructure of the next decade. You'll operate as an extension of their brand and ours, hiring world-class talent whilst building effective hiring foundations.

 

You will

 - Find and engage exceptional talent. We headhunt the best and tap into our deep network.

 - Resolve hiring complexity. Work in nascent environments for ambitious Founders with high expectations.

 - Embrace technology. Stand-up systems to become faster and more precise. Generate hiring-health data to paint compelling insights into progress/performance.

 - Build talent foundations. Introduce 'just enough' process, systems and workflows to succeed at pace.

 

We're looking for people who

 - Have hired exceptional talent, ideally for AI-labs, deep tech companies or trading houses with a high-bar.

 - Have well-formed but loosely held opinions.

 - Communicate with patience supported by logic, data and experience.

 - Have leant into AI to make yourself more effective.

 - Thrive in ambiguity, bringing order where it's needed.

 - Exercise curiosity to become smarter every day.

 - Are emotionally intelligent.

 - Have super-high agency, ambition and work ethic.

source_jobs.title: Founding Talent Lead - AI
source_jobs.description:
Sxaler has been appointed by a rapidly growing AI company in London to find their Founding Talent Lead. This is a high-impact role for someone who can build the recruiting function from the ground up while staying close to the work: sourcing, assessing, closing, and partnering directly with founders on the hires that will shape the company.

Fresh off a significant raise, the company is building an exceptional team with high-talent density. You'll help them define what great looks like, earn the trust of technical and commercial leaders, and can translate ambitious hiring goals into a repeatable talent machine.




THE ROLE

As Founding Talent Lead, you will own talent acquisition across the business, partnering closely with the founding team and senior leaders to define hiring priorities, raise the bar, and deliver exceptional candidates. You will build the systems, processes, and hiring rhythm needed for scale, while remaining hands-on across sourcing, candidate management, interviewing, and closing.

This is not a role for someone who wants to manage from a distance. You will spend meaningful time in the office, understand the culture from the inside, and help shape how the company attracts, assesses, and hires world-class people.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build and lead the company’s talent function from an early stage

 - Partner directly with founders and hiring managers on role definition, search strategy, and assessment

 - Own hands-on sourcing and candidate engagement for critical hires

 - Design scalable recruiting processes, interview loops, scorecards, and reporting

 - Hire across technical, product, commercial, and operational functions

 - Create an exceptional candidate experience in a highly competitive market

 - Develop a clear talent narrative that helps the company stand out to exceptional people

 - Use data, market insight, and judgement to improve hiring quality and velocity

 - Spend time in the office to understand the culture, pace, and talent bar first-hand




YOUR BACKGROUND

 - Experience hiring for high-growth technology companies, ideally at early or growth stage

 - Strong track record across technical hiring, with exposure to AI, ML, infrastructure, engineering, or product roles

 - Ability to operate strategically while staying highly hands-on

 - Confidence partnering with founders and senior leaders

 - Strong sourcing, assessment, stakeholder management, and closing skills

 - Excellent judgement around talent quality, culture fit, and long-term potential

 - Comfort working in ambiguous, fast-moving environments

 - A builder mindset: someone who can create process without adding unnecessary bureaucracy

 - Willingness to work closely with the team in the London office

source_jobs.title: Forward Deployed Recruiter - Hardware
source_jobs.description:
Sxaler operates on behalf of category-defining technology companies, combining exceptional recruiters with proprietary technology to identify, assess and hire top-percentile talent.

Our Forward Deployed Recruiters are embedded with our clients when hiring is p0, operating as one of them. Our stack makes us fast and precise, and our people bring a palate for hiring judgement and orchestration that cannot be fast-tracked. Our charter is maximum impact on hiring in mission-critical environments.



THE MISSION

You'll be deployed inside some of the highest-stakes hiring environments on Earth; we call them missions. Defence and dual-use systems, autonomy and robotics, novel silicon and photonics, advanced manufacturing — the companies building the physical hardware of the next decade, where the engineering is hard, the talent is scarce and the bar is uncompromising. You'll operate as an extension of their brand and ours, hiring world-class talent whilst building effective hiring foundations.



YOU WILL

 - Find and engage exceptional talent. We headhunt the best — across electronics, embedded and firmware, RF, mechanical, systems, semiconductor and manufacturing engineering — and tap into our deep network.

 - Resolve hiring complexity. Work in nascent environments for ambitious founders with high expectations, often against scarce, specialised talent pools and demanding security, clearance or supply-chain constraints.

 - Embrace technology. Stand up systems to become faster and more precise. Generate hiring-health data to paint compelling insights into progress and performance.

 - Build talent foundations. Introduce 'just enough' process, systems and workflows to succeed at pace.
   


WE'RE LOOKING FOR PEOPLE WHO

 - Have hired exceptional talent, ideally for defense, hardware, robotics, semiconductor, aerospace or deep-tech companies with a high bar.

 - Have well-formed but loosely held opinions.

 - Communicate with patience, supported by logic, data and experience.

 - Have leant into AI to make themselves more effective.

 - Thrive in ambiguity, bringing order where it's needed.

 - Exercise curiosity to become smarter every day.

 - Are emotionally intelligent.
